# services.go-httpbin

<!-- AUTO-GENERATED by scripts/nix-options.sh. Do not edit by hand. -->

All options under `services.go-httpbin`.

| Option | Type | Description |
| --- | --- | --- |
| `services.go-httpbin.enable` | `boolean` | Whether to enable go-httpbin. |
| `services.go-httpbin.package` | `package` | The go-httpbin package to use. |
| `services.go-httpbin.settings` | `open submodule of attribute set of (string or signed integer or boolean)` | Configuration of go-httpbin. See <https://github.com/mccutchen/go-httpbin#configuration> for a list of options. |
| `services.go-httpbin.settings.HOST` | `string` | The host to listen on. |
| `services.go-httpbin.settings.PORT` | `16 bit unsigned integer; between 0 and 65535 (both inclusive)` | The port to listen on. |
